message:
feat(beads): enhance atmv, 1n78.30, iqrb with critical improvements

atmv (Bootstrap):
- Add cold recovery when all mesh peers gone
- Add bootstrap idempotency rules
- Add ceremony abort/resume protocol
- Add time source validation during bootstrap
- Add cross-platform hardware token detection
- Add chaos/failure tests

1n78.30 (Agent Integration):
- Add connector discovery endpoint
- Add permission preflight (authz without execution)
- Add tool version pinning for session stability
- Add rate limit coordination across tools
- Add agent identity context in tool calls
- Add tool execution timeout handling

iqrb (fcp-cli):
- Add context switching for multiple meshes (kubectl-style)
- Add stdin input handling (--input-stdin)
- Add pager support for long outputs
- Add offline operation mode
- Add command aliasing
- Add Windows signal handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
